title: Obligation waive vs cancel lifecycle with waiverRefs honoring
summary: Exercises ACP Checkpoint E2 (obligation waive/cancel + waiverRefs honoring on transitions). Drives a single task through three obligation lifecycle terminals: satisfied (normal), waived (with reason+evidenceRefs to satisfy a Requirement{type:'waiver'}), and cancelled (supersession path). Demonstrates that the widened ObligationRecord.status enum (open|satisfied|waived|cancelled|expired) round-trips and that waive — not cancel — satisfies waiver requirements on transitions.

task.goal: Drive a draft through review and audit, exercising obligation satisfy/waive/cancel paths.

steps.summary: Supervisor creates the workflow task pinned to obligation_waive_cancel_demo@1, binds author=larry, reviewer=curly. Auditor intentionally left unbound — the audit obligation will be cleared by waiver, not by signoff.

args.goal: Drive a draft through review and audit, exercising obligation satisfy/waive/cancel paths.

steps.summary: Author attaches the draft_package required by the submit transition.

evidence.summary: Initial draft of the proposal package.

steps.summary: Author applies submit (open/draft -> active/review). Effects fire: create reviewer_signoff_pending (blocking, owner=reviewer) and auto_cleanup_pending (non-blocking, owner=author).
Supervisor cancels the auto_cleanup_pending obligation as superseded — this should NOT satisfy any waiver requirement and should record obligation.cancelled with the supplied reason.

controlAction.reason: Superseded by direct cleanup pipeline run; obligation no longer needed.

steps.summary: Reviewer attaches review_notes and supervisor satisfies reviewer_signoff_pending — normal happy-path obligation closure (status=satisfied, NOT waived).

evidence.summary: Reviewer accepted the draft with two minor comments.

steps.summary: Reviewer attaches review_completion_record required by the advance_to_audit transition.

evidence.summary: Review concluded; ready for audit gate.

steps.summary: Reviewer applies advance_to_audit (active/review -> active/audit). Effects fire: create audit_signoff_pending blocking obligation owned by auditor (unbound).

Author attempts to apply approve without satisfying or waiving audit_signoff_pending. Expect rejection code waiver_required (the approve transition has Requirement{type:'waiver', waiverKind:'audit_signoff_pending'}).

Supervisor (with createWaivers capability) waives audit_signoff_pending with reason + audit_waiver evidence. Records obligation.waived event AND a waiver record that the kernel can match against Requirement{type:'waiver'}.

evidence.summary: Audit waived under §4.2: low-risk template change, prior audit valid.

controlAction.reason: Low-risk template change covered by §4.2; prior audit still in date.

steps.summary: Author re-applies approve. The kernel verifies the waiver record matches Requirement{type:'waiver', waiverKind:'audit_signoff_pending'} and accepts the transition.

negativeChecks.name: cancel-does-not-satisfy-waiver
negativeChecks.summary: Repeat the run but at step 09 use cancel_obligation (with reason) instead of waive_obligation. Then attempt step 10. Expect rejection code waiver_required because cancel does NOT produce a waiver record.

negativeChecks.name: waive-without-capability-rejected
negativeChecks.summary: Recreate the supervisor binding without createWaivers capability. Attempt step 09. Expect rejection code capability_not_granted.

negativeChecks.name: cancel-without-reason-rejected
negativeChecks.summary: Attempt cancel_obligation with empty/missing reason. Expect rejection code invalid_evidence (or a dedicated reason_required code) — cancel REQUIRES reason per E2 design.

negativeChecks.name: waive-idempotency-conflict
negativeChecks.summary: Replay step 09 with the SAME idempotency key but a DIFFERENT reason. Expect rejection code idempotency_conflict.

negativeChecks.name: expired-status-reserved-not-cli-exposed
negativeChecks.summary: Confirm CLI surfaces do not allow setting status=expired directly. The expired terminal is reserved for internal kernel use (future timer-driven expiration). expireObligation kernel method exists but no public CLI/API path. Verifier should confirm `acp task obligation expire` does NOT exist as a command.
